hero.title: Makeup by Laraib
hero.subtitle: Luxury makeup artistry for brides and every special occasion. Creating timeless, elegant looks that enhance your natural beauty. Based in Peshawar, by appointment.

services.heading: Our Services
services.lead: From bridal glamour to special occasion makeup, explore our services and pricing below. All prices are in PKR. Appointments are available through WhatsApp.

hairCare.lead: Laraib's Hair Food is a rich, nourishing hair oil treatment — deeply conditioning strands, strengthening roots, and restoring natural shine with every wash.
hairCare.whatsappText: Hi Laraib, I'd like to order the Hair Food treatment.
hairCare.detail1Text: Nourishing hair oil blend in a 500ml pump bottle.
hairCare.productVideoLabel: Laraib's Hair Food nourishing hair oil

testimonials.heading: What Our Brides Say
testimonials.lead: A few words from real celebrations we've had the honour of being part of.

items.quote: I stopped worrying the moment Laraib started — every detail felt intentional, from the base to the final setting spray.
items.name: Ayesha K.

items.quote: My engagement makeup lasted through the entire evening, photos included. Exactly the soft-glam look I asked for.
items.name: Mehak R.

items.quote: Booked for my sister's mehndi and she looked stunning. Laraib really listens to what you want.
items.name: Sana T.

items.quote: The trial session made all the difference — no surprises on the wedding day, just calm and confidence.
items.name: Hira M.

items.quote: Professional, punctual, and the jewellery setting was flawless. Worth every rupee.
items.name: Fatima A.

items.quote: Party makeup that photographed beautifully under every light. Already rebooked for my next event.
items.name: Noor S.
